page_desc: Uhlelo lokusebenza lwewebhu lwe-imeyili yesikhashana lochwepheshe olunengqondo yesixhumanisi ehlakaniphile nezikhala zezikhangiso.
duplicate_email_error: Ikheli selivele likhona kulabhulali! Zama Isiqalo Se-imeyili Engokwezifiso esihlukile.
delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli bhokisi lokungenayo?
privacy_content:
• Asiyigcini imilayezo unomphela; zisuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kwesikhathi esifushane.
  • Asiceli idatha yomuntu siqu noma ubunikazi ukuze sidale i-imeyili.
  • Isevisi yakhelwe ukuvikela ubumfihlo bakho kugaxekile.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzakalelayo kwedatha njalo emahoreni angama-24.
faq_content:
I-imeyili ihlala isikhathi esingakanani?

Ihlala isebenza inqobo nje uma isiphequluli sivuliwe, futhi umtapo wezincwadi uyasulwa njalo emahoreni angama-24 ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubumfihlo.

Ngingakwazi ukuthola i-imeyili esusiwe?

Cha, uma isisusiwe ngokuzenzakalelayo noma ngesandla, idatha ayikwazi ukutholwa unomphela.

Ingabe isevisi imahhala?

Yebo, isevisi imahhala ngokuphelele futhi isekelwa izikhangiso ezilula ukuqinisekisa ukusebenza okuqhubekayo.

Kungani ngingatholi eminye imilayezo?

Qiniseka ukuthi uvuselela ibhokisi lokungenayo. Amanye amasayithi angase avimbe izizinda zesikhashana; zama ukushintsha isizinda ohlwini.

Ngiwavikela kanjani ama-akhawunti ami asemthethweni?

Sebenzisa i-imeyili yethu yesikhashana ukuze ubhalise kumasayithi angathenjwa ukuze uvikele i-imeyili yakho eyinhloko ekugetshengeni nakugaxekile.
privacy_policy_content:
• Asiyigcini imilayezo unomphela; zisuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kwesikhathi esifushane.
  • Asiceli idatha yomuntu siqu noma ubunikazi ukuze sidale i-imeyili.
  • Isevisi yakhelwe ukuvikela ubumfihlo bakho kugaxekile.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzakalelayo kwedatha njalo emahoreni angama-24.
inbox_full_desc: Uthole inani eliphakeme kakhulu lemilayezo. Ukuze uvikeleke, sicela udale i-imeyili entsha ukuze uthole imilayezo eyengeziwe.
